trivia_bullets.text: Originally printed in Dissension (DIS, 2006) as part of the ten-card Ravnica bounce land cycle — one per two-color guild pairing. This copy is from Duel Decks: Sorin vs. Tibalt (DDK, 2013-03-15). Reprinted 20+ times: Commander precons, Iconic Masters, Modern Masters 2015, Double Masters 2022 (including borderless variant), Commander Anthology, Archenemy, and others.
sources: Draftsim bounce lands article, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Art by John Avon, MTG's most celebrated landscape painter. Career began on book covers including Stephen King's The Dark Tower, Arthur C. Clarke, and Terry Pratchett. MTG has been his longest client for ~30 years. Original Unstable full-art Island sold $20,000 (2018); Lotus Field painting sold $40,000 (2019). 2023 Secret Lair Artist Series released. Avon maintains a personal portfolio page for this specific painting.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: 'Secret Lair Artist Series: John Avon' 2023
Hipsters of the Coast: 'John Avon Unstable Island Painting Sells for $20,000' 2018

trivia_bullets.text: EDHREC rank 469 — one of the most-played black-red lands in Commander. A format staple across Rakdos, Jund, Mardu, and four/five-color lists where free mana fixing outweighs the enter-tapped tempo cost. Legal in Modern, Legacy, Pauper, Commander, and Vintage.
No flavor text on this printing.
